grades.expectation: Response provides a structured checklist of pre-exchange items
grades.reason: Clear structured format with General obligations and Stage C sections, presented as actionable checklist items

grades.expectation: Response mentions specific protocol stages or sections
grades.reason: Explicitly references General paragraphs (a)-(l) and Stage C paragraphs 1-8 with specific citations

grades.expectation: Response covers key items: searches currency, mortgage offer, deposit, insurance, signed contracts
grades.reason: Covers deposit, insurance, and contracts but missing searches currency and mortgage offer verification

grades.expectation: Response references the protocol as source (not just general best practice)
grades.reason: Clearly titled as Law Society Conveyancing Protocol with specific paragraph references throughout
